calendar.matters:
Notice Of Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award Pursuant To Ccp 1280 Et Seq. And 1285.4
Off Calendar Jan-18-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER CHASE MANHATTAN BANK USA, N.A.'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award Pursuant To Ccp 1280 Et Seq. And 1285.4 IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. (301/PJB) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: CHRISTINA PAXTON, CSR # 1558
